title: 4 x Mason Drinking Jars
features: Perfect for summer time - Glass Jar tumblers with Lid and Straw in matching colour
Ideal for beer, cocktails, juice or ice tea - A unique way to serve drinks
Glass jars complete with matching metal lid and plastic straw
Each jar measures - 13.5cm in height and holds 450ml
description: Product Description 8 Litre Dispenser EASY TO USE: A specially designed wide mouth allows you to effortlessly infuse drinks with fruits or berries and makes hand washing the drinks dispenser with tap an absolute breeze. STRONG & DURABLE: Constructed of premium-grade, ultra-durable glass, the glass water dispenser with tap will be secure and balanced for indoor and outdoor use. The crystal-clear walls grant you the grand view of the goodness inside, and the wide mouth authentic mason jar design adds a majestic touch to any setting. CAPACITY: This drinks dispenser with tap is a great addition to any kitchenware range, is made from glass with a red check lid and plastic electroplated tap and has a capacity to hold up to 8 litres of liquid. CARE: The glass jar with tap arrives securely packaged and makes for an awesome, attractive gift. Handwash only. Note: NEVER STORE HOT BEVERAGES INSIDE. SIZE: 18.5 x 18.5 x 33.5cm 4 Mason Jars SIZE: Capacity - 450ml. Measurements - 13x7.5x7.5cm. Metal lid, reusable plastic straw. For cold liquids only. WHAT'S INCLUDED: The set includes 4 Glass Mason Jars in check pattern in yellow, blue, green and red (1 of each colour). GREAT FOR SUMMER: These beautiful mason drinking jars with matching straws are great for Summer parties, BBQs, birthdays and any special occasion! MATCHING REUSABLE STRAWS: Unlike disposable plastic straws, these strong plastic straws are reusable - safe and eco! PERFECT FOR COLD BEVERAGES: Serve up cocktails, smoothies, iced tea, fruity water or any cold beverage you like! The jars can be used with or without the matching lid and straw - decorate them with a slice of fruit or serve iced coffee or chocolate with whipped cream on top. Versatile, durable and colourful - these mason jars are a summer essential! 5 Litre Dispenser SUMMER PARTY: Excellent addition to your summer essentials, this clear drinks dispenser will be the talk of any summer gathering this year. PERFECT FOR PARTIES: Your guests are sure to be impressed when you serve drinks from this gorgeous glass drink dispenser or mason jars. Fill the dispenser with a drink of your choice and relax as your guests will be able to help themselves to a refill when ever they are ready. EASY TO USE: With a handy stopper tap/spout, using this drinks dispenser couldn't be easier. Simply lift the tap to pour yourself a drink and place back to stop the liquid from spilling when not in use. PREMIUM GLASSWARE: This whole range is made from excellent glass making it durable, lasting and beautiful. Available with red, blue and green lids (COLOUR SENT AT RANDOM). SIZE: 5 litres, 31.5x20x20cm (approx). 3 Litre Dispenser SUMMER PARTY: Excellent addition to your summer essentials, this clear drinks dispenser will be the talk of any summer gathering this year. PERFECT FOR PARTIES: Your guests are due to be impressed when you serve beverages in this gorgeous glass drink dispenser or mason jars. Fill the dispenser with a drink of your choice and relax as your guests will be able to help themselves to a refill whenever they are ready. EASY TO USE: With a handy stopper tap/spout, using this drinks dispenser couldn't be easier. Simply lift the tap to pour yourself a drink and place it back to stop the liquid from spilling when not in use. The top of the dispenser has a screw top lid, simply open the lid to access the top of the dispenser to fill it with whatever delicious beverage you desire and then screw it back in place. PREMIUM GLASSWARE: This whole range is made from excellent glass making it durable, lasting and beautiful. SIZE: 4 litres, 25cm height, 14.5cm base diameter, 11cm lid diameter. 8 Litre Dispenser 4 Mason Jars 5 Litre Dispenser 3 Litre Dispenser
